exclusions.reason: Legacy Epson TM-L90 label printer on accounting floor requires NetBIOS over TCP/IP for discovery. Printer is VLAN-isolated from user network; replacement is scheduled in Q2 FY27 capex.
compensatingControls: Printer VLAN isolated from user network with ACL
Printer monitored by Defender for Endpoint (network protection on block)

exclusions.reason: Finance team uses signed Excel models with DDE links to external pricing service. Vendor has committed to removing DDE dependency in v8.2 (scheduled Q3 FY27).
compensatingControls: Macros signed by internal code-signing cert
Files opened from Protected Locations only (SMB-OFF-002 enforced)

exclusions.reason: Intune deployment in progress; compliance policies exist but not yet enforced via Conditional Access. Current state: Intune enrolled on all corporate devices, enforcement target Q2 FY26.
compensatingControls: MFA required for all OneDrive web access
Session sign-in frequency reduced to 8 hours for web access
